data.name: Through the Lens
data.detailed_description:
Through the Lens is a narrative visual novel that blends romance, mystery, and fantasy in a unique dual storyline experience.

You play as a young photographer who moves to Paris for a new job at Mirage Corp — a glamorous fashion company with a darker side. Between photo shoots, intriguing coworkers, and suspicious meetings, you quickly discover that something is very wrong. Your choices shape your relationships, uncover secrets, and determine your fate — whether in love, friendship, or survival.

But each night when you return home, something unexpected unfolds. You discover a mysterious old book titled The Legend of Ardan. As you read, you are transported into a medieval world of knights, tyranny, and ancient magic, where a boy named Ardan seeks vengeance and honor after the brutal murder of his father.

What’s more unsettling? Some faces from this fantasy world look eerily familiar. Coincidence... or is the book trying to reveal something deeper?

🔹 Key Features

  • 💔 Romantic routes with multiple love interests, each with unique personalities and outcomes.

  • 🔍 A dark mystery inside Mirage Corp involving manipulation, threats, and a secret organization known as Velvet.

  • 📖 A fully integrated second narrative: The Legend of Ardan, an epic medieval story of revenge, honor, and seduction.

  • 🌀 Hidden connections between both timelines that gradually unravel.

  • 📸 Exclusive photo gallery, based on romance level.

  • 🗡️ Characters who transcend their worlds — some from the past, some from the present, with unexpected consequences.

    🟪 Perfect For Fans Of:

  • Visual novels with meaningful choices and multiple endings.

  • Parallel universes and fantasy lore.

  • Deep romance arcs and adult storytelling.

  • Intrigue, conspiracies, and supernatural elements.

data.short_description: A visual novel where romance and mystery intertwine. Uncover the dark secrets of Mirage Corp in Paris while diving into a medieval legend hidden within an ancient book. The past and present are about to collide.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 德文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.6 or higher
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
